annotation_basis: Blind support annotation from source O&M text only. Pairs, chains, questions, and lifecycle events were curated without consulting model outputs. When source support was weak, the item was omitted instead of guessed.
timestamp_policy: Synthetic relative timestamps encode manual procedure order only. They are not real-world event dates and must not be interpreted as operational history.

lifecycle_events.description: CNCOM_001 opens with a spindle-chiller branch leak under the true circulation state.
CNCOM_001 repositions the hose and clamp and restores the original clip path.
CNCOM_002 records a drawbar clamp-stack fault tied to force, pressure, and stack geometry.
CNCOM_002 rebuilds the Belleville stack in the correct order and verifies the repair.
CNCOM_003 isolates the boundary to taper contamination and blocked purge rather than bearings.
CNCOM_003 accepts the spindle only after cleaning and purge recovery restore contact and runout.
